name: adtech-spyglass
description: OpenRTB inspector — paste a BidRequest/BidResponse, get human-readable validation, semantic crosscheck, creative preview.

scripts.test: SPYGLASS_DATA_DIR=$(mktemp -d -t spyglass-test-XXXXXX) NODE_ENV=test LOG_LEVEL=silent node --test tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:watch: SPYGLASS_DATA_DIR=$(mktemp -d -t spyglass-test-XXXXXX) NODE_ENV=test LOG_LEVEL=silent node --test --watch tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: SPYGLASS_DATA_DIR=$(mktemp -d -t spyglass-test-XXXXXX) NODE_ENV=test LOG_LEVEL=silent node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/*.test.js
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
